naming.files: Kebab-case for `app/` route segments; PascalCase for components under `components/`. Colocate feature modules under `features/<name>/`.
naming.components: PascalCase file names matching the default export. Prefer composing primitives from `components/ui/` (shadcn) rather than one-off styled divs.
naming.functions: camelCase for utilities and hooks (`useTheme`). Event handlers prefixed with `handle` or passed as `onX` props.
naming.variables: camelCase locals; SCREAMING_SNAKE only for true constants. Prefer `const` and narrow types with `satisfies` where helpful.

file_organization: Routes and layouts live in `app/` (App Router). Shared UI primitives live in `components/ui/` (shadcn). Shared helpers in `lib/` (e.g. `lib/utils.ts` with `cn()`). Global styles in `app/globals.css`; Tailwind v4 via `@tailwindcss/postcss`.
error_handling: Use `try/catch` in Server Actions and surface user-facing errors with Sonner toasts on the client. Prefer returning typed Result-like objects from server utilities when batching work.
state_management: React state and context for local UI; server state from `fetch` in Server Components. No global client store unless a route truly needs it.
testing_patterns: Vitest + Testing Library for components; colocate `*.test.tsx` next to components or under `__tests__/`. Run `pnpm test` from repo root.

common_abstractions.name: cn() helper
common_abstractions.purpose: Merge Tailwind classes with `tailwind-merge` to avoid conflicting utilities.

common_abstractions.name: Button variants
common_abstractions.purpose: Use `class-variance-authority` (cva) for size and variant props on shadcn `Button`.

common_abstractions.name: App layout shell
common_abstractions.purpose: Root layout wraps providers (`ThemeProvider`, `Toaster`) and font loading.

things_to_avoid: Do not hand-edit `components.json` or generated shadcn files without running the CLI.
Avoid fetching in Client Components when the same data can be loaded in a Server Component.
Do not add new CSS files per page; extend Tailwind tokens or use `cn()` instead.

primary_skill.name: Add a shadcn UI primitive
primary_skill.procedure:
1. Run `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add <component>` from the repo root.
2. Import from `@/components/ui/<component>` in your feature code.
3. Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` when merging classes.
4. Run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm test` before opening a PR.
